boundary: current, evaluation, and historical contract vocabulary ownership

concept_owners.concept: durable decision requests, routes, attempts, usage, responses, and failures
benchmark decision models and action-proposal decoding

decisions.subject: GatewayBudget versus DecisionBudget and route vocabulary
decisions.reason: Their adjacent classification encoding, live admission role, and durable decision-record identity differ; GatewayDecisionAdapter remains the explicit translation boundary.

decisions.subject: DecisionProposal versus ActionProposal
decisions.reason: Untrusted model output and authority-bearing policy input have different security and persistence semantics.

decisions.subject: legacy-canonical package classification
decisions.reason: Current runtime, evaluation, and historical compatibility ownership are now named independently.

decisions.subject: telemetry imports from benchmark model contracts
decisions.reason: Telemetry now owns its JSON-shaped attribute types and no longer imports blackcell.models.

hard_rules: current runtime roots cannot import historical compatibility roots
current runtime roots cannot import blackcell.models benchmark implementations
feature cross-slice dependencies are explicit and limited to the declared context pipeline edge

verification.focused: uv run pytest -q tests/architecture/test_dependencies.py tests/unit/test_gateway_decision_adapter.py tests/unit/test_telemetry_recorder.py tests/unit/test_otel_telemetry.py
